mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_TRX_MESSAGE_HISTORY ( TRX_ID, ORG_ID, IO_TYPE, VERSION, MESSAGE_ID, STD_MESSAGE_ID, RES_MESSAGE_ID, STD_RES_MESSAGE_ID, PROXY_RES_YN, PROXY_RES_DATA, EXECUTE_SEQ, PROXY_RES_TYPE, HEX_LOG_YN, MULTI_RES_YN, RES_TYPE_FIELD_ID, MULTI_RES_TYPE, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID, TIMEOUT_SEC, LEGACY_MESSAGE_ID ) SELECT TRX_ID, ORG_ID, IO_TYPE, #{version}, MESSAGE_ID, STD_MESSAGE_ID, RES_MESSAGE_ID, STD_RES_MESSAGE_ID, PROXY_RES_YN, PROXY_RES_DATA, EXECUTE_SEQ, PROXY_RES_TYPE, HEX_LOG_YN, MULTI_RES_YN, RES_TYPE_FIELD_ID, MULTI_RES_TYPE, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID, TIMEOUT_SEC, LEGACY_MESSAGE_ID FROM FWK_TRX_MESSAGE WHERE TRX_ID = #{trxId} AND ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND IO_TYPE = #{ioType}
